{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Telesales Representative",
  "description": "Carolina Logistics is a transportation company providing efficient and innovative solutions tailored to support the unique business growth goals of its clients. We prioritize timely and secure deliveries while ensuring our services remain flexible and cost-effective. Our skilled team, including experienced drivers, leverages high-tech vehicles to handle a variety of freight needs. Known for our commitment to clients and employees, we offer dependable services with benefits such as 24/7 dispatch and road support, fuel advances, and regular vehicle inspections.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Telesales Representative

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT) and Victoria Island - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Fully Onsite)
Work Schedule: 13:00 &ndash; 23:00 (1:00pm- 11:00PM)

Role Description


	This is a full-time, on-site role for a Telesales Representative located in Lagos. The Telesales Representative will be responsible for reaching out to potential and existing clients to promote our services, provide exceptional customer support, and address client inquiries.
	The role will involve consistent communication, meeting sales targets, and participating in training sessions to enhance sales strategies and product knowledge.
	Collaboration with team members to achieve business objectives will also be a key aspect of the role.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree with a minimum of 2 years&rsquo; experience in sales
	Strong Communication and Customer Service skills to effectively engage with clients and address their needs
	Proven experience working with international clients
	Strong American English accent and excellent communication skills
	Solid background in marketing and cold calling
	Confident, target-driven, and highly motivated
	Strong negotiation, analytical, and multitasking skills
	Good computer literacy and attention to detail
	Ability to work with numbers and maintain excellent follow-up


What We&rsquo;re Looking For:


	Strong track record of closing deals and hitting targets
	Excellent communication and relationship-building skills
	Male Only.


Salary
N400,000 - N500,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;anthonia.hunyingan@office-org.net&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;If you are passionate about sales and ready to grow your career in a dynamic logistics environment, we&rsquo;d love to hear from you!",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-28",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-27",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Carolina Logistics"
    
  },

      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",

       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Abuja, Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Telesales Representative Job at Carolina Logistics




        
    

        
        Carolina Logistics is a transportation company providing efficient and innovative solutions tailored to support the unique business growth goals of its clients. We prioritize timely and secure deliveries while ensuring our services remain flexible and cost-effective. Our skilled team, including experienced drivers, leverages high-tech vehicles to handle a variety of freight needs. Known for our commitment to clients and employees, we offer dependable services with benefits such as 24/7 dispatch and road support, fuel advances, and regular vehicle inspections.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Telesales Representative
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Locations: Abuja (FCT) and Victoria Island - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Fully Onsite)
Work Schedule: 13:00 – 23:00 (1:00pm- 11:00PM)

Role Description


	This is a full-time, on-site role for a Telesales Representative located in Lagos. The Telesales Representative will be responsible for reaching out to potential and existing clients to promote our services, provide exceptional customer support, and address client inquiries.
	The role will involve consistent communication, meeting sales targets, and participating in training sessions to enhance sales strategies and product knowledge.
	Collaboration with team members to achieve business objectives will also be a key aspect of the role.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree with a minimum of 2 years’ experience in sales
	Strong Communication and Customer Service skills to effectively engage with clients and address their needs
	Proven experience working with international clients
	Strong American English accent and excellent communication skills
	Solid background in marketing and cold calling
	Confident, target-driven, and highly motivated
	Strong negotiation, analytical, and multitasking skills
	Good computer literacy and attention to detail
	Ability to work with numbers and maintain excellent follow-up


What We’re Looking For:


	Strong track record of closing deals and hitting targets
	Excellent communication and relationship-building skills
	Male Only.


Salary
N400,000 - N500,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: If you are passionate about sales and ready to grow your career in a dynamic logistics environment, we’d love to hear from you!    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing Executive",
  "description": "DAG Industries Nigeria Limited -&nbsp;We provide the most popular range of Bajaj motorcycles, Bajaj tricycles, Bajaj genuine spares, MRF tyres, DAG lubricants and unfaltering after sales service. Backed by its untiring team of professional and trained technicians, authorized service stations and its own service center, DAG has been instrumental in developing Nigeria through building infrastructure and creating jobs thereby providing a livelihood for the common people in Nigeria. We at DAG are committed to provide genuine spare parts, accessories, and a never failing support to its customers and business associates.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Head of Marketing (Digital)

Job Summary


	The Digital Marketing Executive will support the Head of Marketing (Digital) in executing the company&rsquo;s digital marketing initiatives across various online platforms.
	The role focuses on assisting with campaign execution, managing day-to-day digital activities, tracking performance, and supporting lead generation efforts.
	The ideal candidate should have 2&ndash;3 years of relevant experience, be highly organized, proactive, and capable of supporting digital marketing operations in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Support the execution of digital marketing and brand campaigns across social media, website, email, and other digital platforms.
	Assist in managing day-to-day digital marketing activities including content scheduling, publishing, and campaign monitoring.
	Support digital activations and promotional campaigns across online channels.
	Collate and track campaign performance data and assist in preparing basic performance reports and insights.
	Assist in managing social media platforms by monitoring engagement, responding to basic inquiries, and escalating where necessary.
	Support the qualification and collation of marketing leads generated through digital platforms before passing them to the sales or dealer network.
	Assist in updating website content and ensuring digital assets remain current and aligned with brand standards.
	Liaise with vendors, agencies, and internal teams to support timely delivery of digital marketing materials.
	Assist in market research, competitor monitoring, and insight gathering to support marketing decisions.
	Support administrative tasks related to marketing budgets, approvals, documentation, and campaign records.
	Carry out other digital marketing-related tasks as assigned by the Head of Marketing (Digital &amp; Special Projects).


Qualification &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Administration, or a related field
	2&ndash;3 years&rsquo; experience in Digital Marketing or Marketing Support role
	Basic familiarity with social media platforms, digital advertising, and analytics tools is an added advantage.


Required Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Basic understanding of digital marketing and brand communication principles
	Strong coordination and execution support skills
	Basic knowledge of social media management and digital campaign tracking
	Good written and verbal communication skills
	Attention to detail and brand compliance awareness
	Ability to track activities, reports, and simple marketing KPIs
	Strong time management and ability to manage multiple tasks
	Willingness to learn, grow, and adapt in a fast-paced environment
	Team collaboration and stakeholder support skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools and basic digital marketing platforms


Additional Requirements:


	Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams
	Positive attitude with a strong sense of responsibility
	Strong willingness to learn and continuously improve

Digital Marketing Executive Job at DAG Industries Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        DAG Industries Nigeria Limited - We provide the most popular range of Bajaj motorcycles, Bajaj tricycles, Bajaj genuine spares, MRF tyres, DAG lubricants and unfaltering after sales service. Backed by its untiring team of professional and trained technicians, authorized service stations and its own service center, DAG has been instrumental in developing Nigeria through building infrastructure and creating jobs thereby providing a livelihood for the common people in Nigeria. We at DAG are committed to provide genuine spare parts, accessories, and a never failing support to its customers and business associates.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Executive
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Head of Marketing (Digital)

Job Summary


	The Digital Marketing Executive will support the Head of Marketing (Digital) in executing the company’s digital marketing initiatives across various online platforms.
	The role focuses on assisting with campaign execution, managing day-to-day digital activities, tracking performance, and supporting lead generation efforts.
	The ideal candidate should have 2–3 years of relevant experience, be highly organized, proactive, and capable of supporting digital marketing operations in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Support the execution of digital marketing and brand campaigns across social media, website, email, and other digital platforms.
	Assist in managing day-to-day digital marketing activities including content scheduling, publishing, and campaign monitoring.
	Support digital activations and promotional campaigns across online channels.
	Collate and track campaign performance data and assist in preparing basic performance reports and insights.
	Assist in managing social media platforms by monitoring engagement, responding to basic inquiries, and escalating where necessary.
	Support the qualification and collation of marketing leads generated through digital platforms before passing them to the sales or dealer network.
	Assist in updating website content and ensuring digital assets remain current and aligned with brand standards.
	Liaise with vendors, agencies, and internal teams to support timely delivery of digital marketing materials.
	Assist in market research, competitor monitoring, and insight gathering to support marketing decisions.
	Support administrative tasks related to marketing budgets, approvals, documentation, and campaign records.
	Carry out other digital marketing-related tasks as assigned by the Head of Marketing (Digital & Special Projects).


Qualification & Experience


	Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Administration, or a related field
	2–3 years’ experience in Digital Marketing or Marketing Support role
	Basic familiarity with social media platforms, digital advertising, and analytics tools is an added advantage.


Required Skills & Competencies:


	Basic understanding of digital marketing and brand communication principles
	Strong coordination and execution support skills
	Basic knowledge of social media management and digital campaign tracking
	Good written and verbal communication skills
	Attention to detail and brand compliance awareness
	Ability to track activities, reports, and simple marketing KPIs
	Strong time management and ability to manage multiple tasks
	Willingness to learn, grow, and adapt in a fast-paced environment
	Team collaboration and stakeholder support skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools and basic digital marketing platforms


Additional Requirements:


	Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams
	Positive attitude with a strong sense of responsibility
	Strong willingness to learn and continuously improve
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Experience Account Officer",
  "description": "Consulting and Biz Solutions Limited is one of the leading accounting firms providing financial services to individuals and businesses. We are seeking a skilled Sales Executive to join our team and drive our marketing efforts.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experience Account Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ojota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Journal Entries: Posting and processing journal entries to ensure all business transactions are accurately recorded
	Accounts Receivable: Updating accounts receivable and issuing invoices to clients
	Accounts Payable: Updating accounts payable and performing reconciliations to ensure accuracy
	Financial Statements: Assisting in the preparation of balance sheets, income statements, and other financial statements in accordance with legal and company accounting guidelines
	Expense Review: Reviewing expenses, payroll records, and other assigned tasks to ensure accuracy and compliance
	Financial Data Management: Updating financial data in databases to ensure accuracy and timely availability of information
	Reporting: Preparing and submitting weekly and monthly reports to management
	Month-End/Year-End Closings: Assisting senior accountants in the preparation of monthly and yearly closings
	Special Projects: Assisting with other accounting projects as assigned by management


Requirements
To be considered for the position of an experienced accountant, the following requirements must be met:


	Professional Certification: Possession of a professional certification such as ACA, ACCA, or CIMA
	Minimum Experience: At least 5 years of experience in accounting, preferably in a similar industry or role


Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in accounting software such as SAP, Oracle, or QuickBooks
	Strong knowledge of financial regulations and laws, including tax laws and financial reporting requirements
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
	Education: A Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Accounting or a related field


Key Skills:


	Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
	Ability to work accurately and efficiently in a fast-paced environment
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team


Additional Requirements:


	Strong knowledge of financial planning and budgeting
	Experience with financial analysis and reporting
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information


Preferred Qualifications:


	Master&#39;s Degree: A Master&#39;s Degree in Accounting or a related field
	Specialized Certifications: Possession of specialized certifications such as CFA or CPA
	Industry Experience: Experience working in a similar industry or role
	Leadership Experience: Experience leading a team or supervising staff


Salary
N120,000 - N350,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@bizsolutionsgroup.net&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Experience Account Officer Job at Consulting and Biz Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Consulting and Biz Solutions Limited is one of the leading accounting firms providing financial services to individuals and businesses. We are seeking a skilled Sales Executive to join our team and drive our marketing efforts.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Experience Account Officer

Job Location: Ojota, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Journal Entries: Posting and processing journal entries to ensure all business transactions are accurately recorded
	Accounts Receivable: Updating accounts receivable and issuing invoices to clients
	Accounts Payable: Updating accounts payable and performing reconciliations to ensure accuracy
	Financial Statements: Assisting in the preparation of balance sheets, income statements, and other financial statements in accordance with legal and company accounting guidelines
	Expense Review: Reviewing expenses, payroll records, and other assigned tasks to ensure accuracy and compliance
	Financial Data Management: Updating financial data in databases to ensure accuracy and timely availability of information
	Reporting: Preparing and submitting weekly and monthly reports to management
	Month-End/Year-End Closings: Assisting senior accountants in the preparation of monthly and yearly closings
	Special Projects: Assisting with other accounting projects as assigned by management


Requirements
To be considered for the position of an experienced accountant, the following requirements must be met:


	Professional Certification: Possession of a professional certification such as ACA, ACCA, or CIMA
	Minimum Experience: At least 5 years of experience in accounting, preferably in a similar industry or role


Technical Skills:


	Proficiency in accounting software such as SAP, Oracle, or QuickBooks
	Strong knowledge of financial regulations and laws, including tax laws and financial reporting requirements
	Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills
	Education: A Bachelor's Degree in Accounting or a related field


Key Skills:


	Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
	Ability to work accurately and efficiently in a fast-paced environment
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team


Additional Requirements:


	Strong knowledge of financial planning and budgeting
	Experience with financial analysis and reporting
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information


Preferred Qualifications:


	Master's Degree: A Master's Degree in Accounting or a related field
	Specialized Certifications: Possession of specialized certifications such as CFA or CPA
	Industry Experience: Experience working in a similar industry or role
	Leadership Experience: Experience leading a team or supervising staff


Salary
N120,000 - N350,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Business Staff / Public Relations Officer",
  "description": "Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited is amining company engaged in the exploration, mining, and processing of lithium. With a strong presence across the country, the company operates branches in Lagos, Abuja, and Nasarawa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Staff / Public Relations Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a smart, confident, and proactive male candidate to join our team as a Business Staff / Public Relations Officer.
	The ideal candidate will represent the company positively, manage external relations, and ensure smooth follow-up on official matters.


Key Responsibilities


	Represent the company in a professional and positive manner
	Build and maintain a strong public image for the organization
	Handle follow-ups on company permits, documentation, and external engagements
	Liaise with government agencies and other stakeholders
	Ensure effective communication between the company and the public
	Monitor and report on ongoing external matters


Requirements


	Must be male
	Must be fluent in Hausa language
	Previous experience working in public Relations
	Strong written and oral communication skills
	Good interpersonal and public relations skills
	Ability to follow up effectively and pay attention to detail
	Must be proactive, responsible, and well-organized.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;ganfenglithiumindustrylimited1@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Business Staff / Public Relations Officer Job at Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited




        
    

        
        Ganfeng Lithium Industry Limited is amining company engaged in the exploration, mining, and processing of lithium. With a strong presence across the country, the company operates branches in Lagos, Abuja, and Nasarawa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Staff / Public Relations Officer
Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a smart, confident, and proactive male candidate to join our team as a Business Staff / Public Relations Officer.
	The ideal candidate will represent the company positively, manage external relations, and ensure smooth follow-up on official matters.


Key Responsibilities


	Represent the company in a professional and positive manner
	Build and maintain a strong public image for the organization
	Handle follow-ups on company permits, documentation, and external engagements
	Liaise with government agencies and other stakeholders
	Ensure effective communication between the company and the public
	Monitor and report on ongoing external matters


Requirements


	Must be male
	Must be fluent in Hausa language
	Previous experience working in public Relations
	Strong written and oral communication skills
	Good interpersonal and public relations skills
	Ability to follow up effectively and pay attention to detail
	Must be proactive, responsible, and well-organized.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Financial Services

Position Summary


	The Internal Control Officer will be responsible for ensuring adherence to internal policies, regulatory requirements, and risk management standards.
	The role involves monitoring operational processes, identifying control gaps, and implementing corrective measures to safeguard the institution&rsquo;s assets and integrity.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct routine and surprise audits across departments and branches
	Monitor compliance with internal policies, procedures, and regulatory guidelines
	Identify control weaknesses and recommend practical corrective actions
	Review financial and operational activities to detect irregularities or fraud risks
	Prepare detailed audit and control reports for management review
	Ensure proper documentation and record-keeping across all units
	Support the implementation of risk management frameworks and internal control systems
	Liaise with external auditors and regulatory bodies when required


Qualifications &amp; Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related field
	2&ndash;4 years of relevant experience in internal control, audit, or compliance within a financial institution
	Professional certification (e.g., ACA, ACCA, CIA) is an added advantage
	Strong analytical and investigative skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail
	Sound knowledge of regulatory standards and financial controls
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel
	Excellent reporting and communication skills.


Compensation &amp; Benefits


	Salary: N250,00 per month.
	Very competitive salary package
	Performance-based incentives
	Career growth and professional development opportunities
	Supportive and structured work environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;olayidgreat@gmail.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&quot;Internal Control Ibadan&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Internal Control Officer Job at Redswitch Collections




        
    

        
        Redswitch Collections is a dynamic and innovative consultancy firm that specializes in providing strategic advice and tailored solutions across a wide array of industries. With a focus on enhancing business performance and solving complex challenges, we collaborate closely with our clients to deliver measurable results that drive growth and sustainability. Whether it’s optimizing operations, improving financial performance, or navigating industry-specific challenges, we help organizations reach their full potential.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Internal Control Officer

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Financial Services

Position Summary


	The Internal Control Officer will be responsible for ensuring adherence to internal policies, regulatory requirements, and risk management standards.
	The role involves monitoring operational processes, identifying control gaps, and implementing corrective measures to safeguard the institution’s assets and integrity.


Key Responsibilities


	Conduct routine and surprise audits across departments and branches
	Monitor compliance with internal policies, procedures, and regulatory guidelines
	Identify control weaknesses and recommend practical corrective actions
	Review financial and operational activities to detect irregularities or fraud risks
	Prepare detailed audit and control reports for management review
	Ensure proper documentation and record-keeping across all units
	Support the implementation of risk management frameworks and internal control systems
	Liaise with external auditors and regulatory bodies when required


Qualifications & Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related field
	2–4 years of relevant experience in internal control, audit, or compliance within a financial institution
	Professional certification (e.g., ACA, ACCA, CIA) is an added advantage
	Strong analytical and investigative skills
	High level of integrity and attention to detail
	Sound knowledge of regulatory standards and financial controls
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel
	Excellent reporting and communication skills.


Compensation & Benefits


	Salary: N250,00 per month.
	Very competitive salary package
	Performance-based incentives
	Career growth and professional development opportunities
	Supportive and structured work environment.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Internal Control Ibadan" as the subject of the mail.
